title: Home thread: agent next-step suggestion (Tab-to-accept)
prompt:
GOAL: In the home (sidebar) chat, besides self-titling, let the thread's OWN agent surface a suggested NEXT STEP at the end of a turn, rendered as a ghosted suggestion the user can accept with Tab (like Claude Code's next-step hint). Tab fills the suggestion into the composer (editable, NOT auto-sent); the user can tweak and send. This REUSES the just-shipped home-thread self-titling pattern — do not invent a parallel mechanism.

EXISTING FOUNDATION TO REUSE (already on main):
- src/commands/home-thread.ts — 'kanban home-thread set-title' CLI: resolves the thread from KANBAN_SESSION_TASK_ID env (or --session-id), routes to the store, returns the standard runCliCommand envelope. ADD a sibling verb next to it.
- src/session/home-thread-registry.ts — pure thread record ops + titleSource auto/manual. RuntimeHomeChatThread / RuntimeHomeChatThreadTitleSource in src/core/api-contract.ts (~line 300-352).
- The append-system-prompt mechanism that scopes instructions to home/sidebar agent sessions (same one that tells the agent to set-title).
- KANBAN_SESSION_TASK_ID_ENV / KANBAN_SESSION_WORKSPACE_ID_ENV injected into the session env (src/terminal/hook-runtime-context.ts).
- Frontend: web-ui/src/components/home-agent/ (home-sidebar-agent-panel.tsx composer/chat, home-thread-bar.tsx), use-home-threads.ts, the granular runtime store (memory 'perf10' — subscribe new slice in the LEAF composer component).

REQUIRED WORK:
BACKEND/CLI/contract
1. New CLI verb 'kanban home-thread suggest-next "<text>"' (mirror set-title: env-resolved session id or --session-id, runCliCommand envelope, register in cli-schema.ts).
2. Store the suggestion as a TRANSIENT per-thread 'pendingNextStep' (string | null) — add to the thread record + contract. It is EPHEMERAL: a new suggest-next overwrites it; it is CLEARED when the user sends a message in that thread (and when the thread's agent starts a new turn). Persist lightly (survives a refresh) but it is not conversation history. Flow it to the UI over the SAME broadcast the title uses.
3. Append a system-prompt instruction (scoped to home/sidebar sessions, alongside the set-title instruction): at the end of a turn, if there's an obvious next action the user is likely to want, propose exactly ONE concise next-step prompt via 'kanban home-thread suggest-next'. Keep it short and actionable; omit it when there's no clear next step.

FRONTEND
4. In the thread composer, render pendingNextStep as a ghosted/dim suggestion (e.g. placeholder-style hint below or inside the empty input, with a subtle 'Tab' affordance per AGENTS.md ui primitives / Kbd). Pressing Tab when the composer is empty/focused fills the suggestion text into the input (editable), does NOT auto-send. Dismiss on Escape or as soon as the user types. Clear the hint once consumed or superseded.
5. Live-update when the backend broadcasts a new pendingNextStep; clear it locally on send.

CONSTRAINTS:
- Scope to home/sidebar threads only (not task-running agents).
- Follow AGENTS.md web-ui rules (Tailwind v4, Radix, lucide, surface tokens, src/components/ui, react-use). No client-side LLM call — the suggestion comes from the agent via the CLI.
- Backward-compat: pendingNextStep optional; existing threads.json loads cleanly.

ACCEPTANCE:
- After an agent turn, a relevant next-step hint appears in the composer; Tab fills it into the input (editable), user can edit and send.
- Hint clears when the user types/sends or the agent supersedes it; no clear next step => no hint.
- 'kanban home-thread suggest-next' works from inside a session using only injected env and returns the standard envelope.
- web:typecheck + biome clean. No any types.
